stem: The function f(x) is defined as 25 less than 6 times a number x. If y = f(x) is graphed in the xy-plane, what is the best interpretation of the x-intercept?

answerOptions.content: The value of f is 0 when x = 6.
The value of f is 0 when x = 25/6.

rationale:
Choice D is correct. f(x) = 6x - 25. Setting f(x) = 0: 6x = 25, so x = 25/6. The x-intercept is at (25/6, 0), meaning f(x) = 0 when x = 25/6.

Choice A describes the y-intercept (with wrong sign). Choice B describes the slope. Choice C uses x = 6 instead of 25/6.
